name: Cauliflower- Crunchy Curried
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the sesame seeds in a frying pan without any added oil until golden brown.
2. Add the cumin seeds to the same pan and toast until they pop, smell aromatic, and are heated through (about 1-2 minutes on a hot pan).
3. Grind the toasted sesame and cumin seeds together or separately.
4. Mix the grounded seeds with garlic, ginger, and peanuts, adding turmeric, chili powder, ground cloves, and salt. Set aside.
5. Chop the onions and sauté them in oil until transparent and lightly colored, taking care not to burn them.
6. Stir the spice mixture into the onions.
7. Add the cauliflower florets (about walnut-sized) to the pan.
8. Pour in lemon juice and about 1/4 cup of water, cover, and cook over moderate heat, stirring occasionally until the cauliflower is tender-crisp.
9. If needed, add a little more water during cooking.
10. If there is excess liquid when the cauliflower is cooked, thicken it with a cornflour paste and toss the cauliflower in it.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt if necessary.
12. Serve with dal, rice, a tomato salad, cucumbers in yogurt, or toasted coconut.
